revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Str left: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: RFPP request ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text: <includeonly>{{safesubst:padleft:|{{{2|1}}}|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Added safesubst
revision.text: <includeonly>{{safesubst:padleft:|{{{2|1}}}|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 「[[Template:Str left]]」の保護レベルを変更しました: [[Wikipedia:保護依頼]]による: [[Wikipedia:保護の方針#半永久的な保護]]「[[Wikipedia:影響が特に大きいテンプレート|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]」 ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
revision.text: <includeonly>{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}padleft:|{{{2|1}}}|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Änderte die Schutzeinstellungen für „[[Vorlage:Str left]]“: Häufig eingebundene Vorlage ([Bearbeiten=Nur Sichter] (unbeschränkt) [Verschieben=Nur Administratoren] (unbeschränkt))
revision.text: <onlyinclude><includeonly>{{#invoke:Str|left|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}}}</includeonly></onlyinclude> {{Dokumentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Str_left]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
revision.text: <includeonly>{{safesubst:padleft:|{{{2|1}}}|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{safesubst:padleft:|{{{2|1}}}|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly>{{safesubst:padleft:|{{{2|1}}}|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly>{{safesubst:padleft:|{{{2|1}}}|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{safesubst:padleft:|{{{2|1}}}|{{{1}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

</noinclude>
